rules.name: explicit-any
rules.message: Explicit 'any' type defeats TypeScript's type safety.
rules.fix_hint: Replace with a specific type, unknown, or a generic type parameter.

rules.name: eval-usage
rules.message: eval() is a critical security risk — allows arbitrary code execution.
rules.fix_hint: Use JSON.parse(), Function constructor (if absolutely needed), or refactor to avoid dynamic evaluation.

rules.name: hardcoded-credentials
rules.message: Possible hardcoded credential detected.
rules.fix_hint: Move secrets to environment variables or a vault; reference via process.env or config.

rules.name: console-output
rules.message: Console output — use a structured logger instead in production code.
rules.fix_hint: Replace with a logger (e.g., pino, winston) or remove before merging.

rules.name: empty-catch
rules.message: Empty catch block silently swallows errors.
rules.fix_hint: Log the error, rethrow, or add a comment explaining why it is intentionally ignored.

rules.name: non-null-assertion
rules.message: Non-null assertion (!) — risks runtime TypeError if value is null/undefined.
rules.fix_hint: Use optional chaining (?.), nullish coalescing (??), or add a proper null check.

rules.name: deep-nesting
rules.message: Deep nesting detected (4+ indent levels with 2-space indent) — reduces readability.
rules.fix_hint: Extract inner logic into named functions or use early returns / guard clauses.

rules.name: magic-numbers
rules.message: Magic number in comparison — extract to a named constant for clarity.
rules.fix_hint: Define a const with a descriptive name.

rules.name: hardcoded-hex-color
rules.message: Hardcoded hex color — use a theme token or CSS custom property instead.
rules.fix_hint: Replace with a semantic token (e.g., bg-background, text-foreground) or CSS var(--color-*).

rules.name: hardcoded-rgb-color
rules.message: Hardcoded rgb/rgba color — use a theme token or CSS custom property.
rules.fix_hint: Replace with a CSS var(--color-*) or theme token.

rules.name: animation-layout-property
rules.message: Animating layout property — causes expensive reflow. Use transform/opacity instead.
rules.fix_hint: Replace with transform: translate/scale or opacity transitions for GPU-composited animation.

rules.name: missing-reduced-motion-hint
rules.message: CSS keyframes animation defined — ensure prefers-reduced-motion is respected nearby.
rules.fix_hint: Add @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) { animation: none; } for this keyframe.

rules.name: api-key-exposure
rules.message: Possible API key or access token in source code
rules.fix_hint: Move to environment variables or a secrets vault. Never commit secrets.

rules.name: private-key-block
rules.message: Private key detected in source code
rules.fix_hint: Remove private key from source. Use key management service or environment variable.

rules.name: connection-string-credentials
rules.message: Connection string with embedded credentials detected
rules.fix_hint: Use environment variables for connection strings. Never embed passwords in URIs.

rules.name: email-in-source
rules.message: Email address detected in source — verify this is not PII
rules.fix_hint: If this is a real email address, consider moving to configuration. Test fixtures should use @example.com.

rules.name: ai-hardcoded-jwt
rules.message: Hardcoded JWT token detected -- AI generators often embed sample tokens that may be valid
rules.fix_hint: Remove hardcoded JWT. Load tokens from environment variables or secret managers at runtime.

rules.name: ai-cors-wildcard
rules.message: CORS wildcard origin (*) -- AI generators default to permissive CORS from tutorial code
rules.fix_hint: Restrict CORS to specific allowed origins. Use environment-based origin configuration.

rules.name: ai-verbose-error-response
rules.message: Error object sent directly in response -- may expose internal details to clients
rules.fix_hint: Return a generic error message to the client. Log the full error server-side.

rules.name: ai-return-in-finally
rules.message: Return statement in finally block overrides the return value from try/catch
rules.fix_hint: Move the return outside the try/catch/finally or use a result variable.

rules.name: ai-fire-and-forget-async
rules.message: Possible fire-and-forget async operation -- mutation method called without await
rules.fix_hint: Add 'await' if this is an async operation, or explicitly handle the returned Promise.

rules.name: ai-full-lodash-import
rules.message: Full lodash import adds ~70KB to bundle -- use per-function imports for tree-shaking
rules.fix_hint: Replace with 'import debounce from "lodash/debounce"' or use lodash-es for ESM tree-shaking.

rules.name: ai-inline-object-prop
rules.message: Inline style object in JSX creates a new object on every render, causing unnecessary re-renders in child components
rules.fix_hint: Extract the style object to a const outside the component or use useMemo/CSS classes.

rules.name: ai-sync-fs-in-server
rules.message: Synchronous file system operation blocks the Node.js event loop -- use async fs API
rules.fix_hint: Use fs.promises.readFile / fs.promises.writeFile or the callback-based API.

file_size._note: Lines of code. Frontend components tend to be larger due to JSX markup.

function_size._note: Detected via awk brace-counting, not grep.

boundaries.name: No database imports in domain/model layer
boundaries.message: Domain/model layer must not import ORM or database libraries directly — use repository interfaces
